response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced and capable full-stack and systems engineer, but his background is fundamentally mismatched for this role. He primarily works with TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, and lacks the mandatory 5-10 years of hands-on C++ experience on Windows. Additionally, he does not have the required enterprise database experience (SQL Server/Oracle) or the specialized Capital Markets/Fixed Income domain expertise necessary for this position.
strengths: Extensive overall software engineering experience (15+ years) with a strong focus on CI/CD, TDD, and software craftsmanship.
Proven ability to work across multiple tech stacks and system architectures, including microservices and event-driven platforms.
Some exposure to the wealth/investment technology sector through his tenure at RIDE Capital.
concerns: Fails the mandatory requirement of 5-10 years of C++ experience; his only professional C/C++ role was a 7-month stint in 2014-2015.
Lacks required domain expertise in Capital Markets, Investment Banking, or Fixed Income derivatives.
No demonstrated experience with Microsoft SQL Server or Oracle on the Windows platform.
